build.beforeDevCommand: npm run build:mcp && npm run dev
build.beforeBuildCommand: npm run build:mcp && npm run build

security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost asset: http://asset.localhost; script-src 'self'; script-src-attr 'none'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http: https: ws: wss:; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset: http://asset.localhost http: https:; media-src 'self' data: blob: asset: http://asset.localhost http: https:; font-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost; worker-src 'self' blob:; frame-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self';
